posts.author: Idit (Idit Peker)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi
I am trying to send emails using the Gmail integration. I can send emails from my user account, but I am unable to send emails from a service account (which has no inbox and is a no-reply user). when adding inbox to the service user the mail is been sent
Can you advise ?
